abstract: This research proposes an AI-driven driver wellness monitoring system that combines fatigue detection, heart-rate estimation, and behavioral analytics to predict unsafe driving conditions. Deep learning and sensor fusion techniques are used to improve road safety through real-time alerts and adaptive risk scoring.
